{{Quote|Ah. Then we do not conflict. Frothing disease to your foes, then.|Irasal ke Voltin to Wedge Antilles|<ref name="sof" />}}
'''Irasal ke Voltin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Adumar/Legends|Adumari]] who had a feud with fellow Adumari [[Garatty ke Kith]]. Intending to ambush ke Kith as he returned home, ke Voltin tried to enter his apartment but after learning that it was locked, he then tried finding a hiding spot to wait. It was then when ke Voltin encountered [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]], who were waiting for [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] [[Iella Wessiri Antilles|Iella Wessiri]], ke Kith's neighbor. After confirming that the pilots were neither hunting him nor his target, ke Voltin stated that they had no quarrel and wished them good fortune before relocating to a different hiding place.<ref name="sof" />

When ke Kith finally arrived, ke Voltin attacked and engaged him in a blastsword duel. ke Voltin emerged victorious and departed the apartment with ke Kith slung over his shoulders. Janson believed ke Kith to have been [[Death/Legends|dead]].<ref name="sof" />

==Equipment==
ke Voltin was equipped with an [[Adumari pistol]] and a [[Blastsword]].<ref name="sof" />

==Behind the scenes==
Irasal ke Voltin is a character created by author [[Aaron Allston]] in [[1999]] for his novel ''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'', the ninth novel in the [[Star Wars: X-Wing (novel series)|''Star Wars: X-wing'']] series.<ref name="sof" />

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' {{1st}}
